releaseNotes: New on the home screen: My List (your favorite channels) and Recordings, plus the redesigned big Live TV/Movies/TV Shows cards and Multi-Screen. You can now record a live channel straight from the player (record button in the live controls) and play it back later from Recordings. Also: player controls no longer flash off instantly when pressing OK on the remote, Movies/Shows playback keeps the screen from sleeping, and the Movies/Shows player has rewind/fast-forward/stop/closed-captions, a sleep timer, and an optional Auto Frame Rate setting. Your saved playlist logins carry over automatically - no need to re-enter anything.
